nasb.text: he said to Arioch, the king’s commander, “For what reason is the decree from the king so urgent?” Then Arioch informed Daniel about the matter.

esv.text: He declared to Arioch, the king’s captain, “Why is the decree of the king so urgent?” Then Arioch made the matter known to Daniel.

cnv.text: 但以理對王的護衛長亞略說：“王的命令為甚麼這樣嚴厲呢？”亞略就把這事告訴但以理。

ccb.text: 他问王的护卫长亚略：“王的命令为何这样紧急？”亚略就把情况告诉他。
